subcodes.first_line: This is the Book which the Lord of Names and Creator of Heaven hath sent down unto him who hath turned unto God, the Lord of lords. Let not sorrow overtake thee [3.5s]... ...Glory be unto Thee, O Lord my God! I beseech Thee by Thy name which overshadoweth all names,and by the stroke of Thy Most Exalted Pen
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مولی الاسماء و فاطر السماء لمن اقبل الی الله رب الارباب ایاک ان تحزنک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
